description: Jamie King discusses his journey in the gaming industry, starting from his work on Grand Theft Auto to his experiences at Rockstar Games. He reflects on the cultural influences in game development and the evolution of gaming economics, including the impact of blockchain and Web3 technologies.
topic_summary: Jamie King shares insights on his career at Rockstar Games, the development of iconic games like Grand Theft Auto, and the future of gaming with blockchain and Web3 [t=0:31].
